description: Policy for XML-to-SQL mapping traceability in the BenchCore benchmark pack. Ensures every SQL operation derived from XML configuration is traceable back to its source element.

mapping_rules.description: Every SQL SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE derived from an XML element must include a source_xpath annotation.
Column mappings must preserve the original XML element name as a SQL alias or comment.
mapping_rules.requirement: SELECT xml_element_name AS db_column_name OR COMMENT 'xml_element_name'

mapping_rules.description: JOIN conditions derived from XML relationships must reference the source XML path in a comment.
mapping_rules.requirement: ON a.id = b.id /* from XML path: /story/relationships/join */

mapping_rules.description: WHERE clause filters derived from XML must include the source element reference.

traceability_requirements.from_xml_to_sql: Every XML data element must map to at least one SQL column or parameter.
traceability_requirements.from_sql_to_xml: Every SQL column or parameter must be traceable to exactly one XML source element.
traceability_requirements.orphan_detection: SQL elements without XML provenance and XML elements without SQL targets are flagged as orphans.
